signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb), missing forecasts of 2.4% amid Middle East oil shocks; Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% (7th meeting) on Apr 10[1][3].** | NO | HIGH confidence
